_instructions: REAL-RECORD VALIDATION CASE (level-2), COMPLETED. UYAP judicial e-Satis COMPLETED real-estate auction (Ankara/Yenimahalle commercial unit 'dukkan'), manually audited by the operator from the official e-Satis result and auction documents. Validates appraisal -> winning-bid normalization for a completed JUDICIAL AUCTION (mechanism=auction, reference_price_type=appraisal), NOT ordinary residential asking-to-closing (excluded from asking_to_closing_labels()). CRITICAL AREA-FIELD FINDING: 509.00 m2 = cadastral PARCEL surface area; 32.50 m2 = unit measured NET usable area; the unit's GROSS floor area is NOT reported by the source, so gross_m2 is NULL and 509 is NOT injected. The existing adapter/RealizedLabel already treat gross_m2 as OPTIONAL, so no schema change was required; parcel_area_m2 and unit_net_m2 are preserved in parser_input as distinct area provenance. BOUNDARY: operator supplies structured audited fields; no raw UYAP text parsing. PRIVACY: no party/personal names, payment or account data are transcribed anywhere; external_ref uses the public KAYIT NO 16766356960, never the icra dosya/sale-file number.

manifest.notes: VALIDATED completed judicial e-auction (Ankara/Yenimahalle dukkan). First-auction result: sold 2026-06-24 (11:15-11:31); court appraisal (muhammen bedel) TRY 4,500,000.00 -> winning bid (ihale bedeli) TRY 4,545,000.00; mechanism=auction; reference_price_type=appraisal. AREA-SEMANTICS AUDIT: 509.00 m2 is the CADASTRAL PARCEL surface area and 32.50 m2 is the unit's measured NET usable area; the source does NOT report the unit's GROSS floor area, so gross_m2 stays NULL (509 is NOT injected). parcel_area_m2 / unit_net_m2 preserved in parser_input as provenance. external_ref = public KAYIT NO 16766356960 (NOT the sale-file number). No party/personal or payment/account data stored. Excluded from asking_to_closing_labels().
